{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/anthropic-vacancies/clusters/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Кластеры вакансий"
tags:
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Кластеры вакансий

_Файлов:_ 16

h2. Содержание

* [[01-ai-research-engineering|01-ai-research-engineering.md]] — 
* [[02-sales|02-sales.md]] — 
* [[03-finance|03-finance.md]] — 
* [[04-security|04-security.md]] — 
* [[05-marketing-brand|05-marketing-brand.md]] — 
* [[06-engineering-design-product|06-engineering-design-product.md]] — 
* [[07-software-engineering-infrastructure|07-software-engineering-infrastructure.md]] — 
* [[08-safeguards-trust-safety|08-safeguards-trust-safety.md]] — 
* [[09-product-management-support-ops|09-product-management-support-ops.md]] — 
* [[10-compute|10-compute.md]] — 
* [[11-legal|11-legal.md]] — 
* [[12-technical-program-management|12-technical-program-management.md]] — 
* [[13-communications|13-communications.md]] — 
* [[14-public-policy|14-public-policy.md]] — 
* [[15-public-benefit|15-public-benefit.md]] — 
* [[16-people|16-people.md]] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[overview]] (сходство 0.33)
* [[12-technical-program-management]] (сходство 0.23)
* [[13-communications]] (сходство 0.20)
